name: mr-lexars-border-cross-boarder
description: MR Lexars Cross Border Transportation - SA ↔ Botswana ↔ Zimbabwe

scripts.cap:android: npx cap copy android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npx cap copy ios && npx cap open ios
